rectified_nodes.fix_description: Broken circular data_flow dependency with b2 by replacing the direct b2->b1 edge with a path through a new temporary node b4 (b2->b4, b4->b1).
Rectified problematic output data_flow dependency by routing b2's data_flow to b1 through temporary node b4 to break the cycle. Added data_flow b2->b3 to connect assignment to return.
Added data_flow edge from nearest assignment b2 to return b3.
